CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(Project__r.strk__Project_Type__c, 'Relo (RELO)') || ISPICKVAL(Project__r.strk__Project_Type__c, 'Relo Permit Ready (RELO-P)') , Project__r.Receive_RF_Preferred_Candidate_A__c +10, IF( ISPICKVAL(Project__r.strk__Project_Type__c, 'Build to Suit (BTS)') || ISPICKVAL(Project__r.strk__Project_Type__c, 'Build to Suit - Permit Ready (BTS-P)') , Project__r.Project_Extension__r.Site_Acquisition_Complete_RE020_A__c+42 , null))
CustomField.label: SDP Due Date
